examples: By Western standards the prices are ludicrously low.
Launching and maintaining suitable satellites would be ludicrously expensive.
Like so many other grouchy early morning, pre-coffee utterances I make, this one was ludicrously off-key.
Eventually, I found my arms reluctantly outstretched with a ludicrously large tourist map in front of my face.
But none of these methods promise the ironic death this ludicrously macho handset demands.
